title: GitHub Copilot searching for unavailable files
author: Sukesh 2
text:
I'm just getting started with GitHub Copilot. In the chat window, when I asked this question:
What projects are in this solution and how do things work together?
There were some errors. It seems it is looking files by some pattern and those files are unavailable in the solution.
The provided answer is generic and clearly not related to the projects in the solution. And I guess this is because of those errors.
Are these errors expected or am I missing any configurations?
Also, there is no TinyShop
project in the solution as suggested in the AI response.
